channel.title: Azure SQL Database on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure SQL Database on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Microsoft Entra server principals on Azure SQL Database
item.description:
Microsoft Entra server principals (logins) for Azure SQL Database are now generally available. You can now create logins with CREATE LOGIN ... FROM EXTERNAL PROVIDER in the virtual master database, aligning Microsoft Entra identities with SQL logins.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure SQL as a knowledge source in Foundry IQ
item.description:
Azure SQL Database is now available in public preview as a first-class Knowledge Source in Azure AI Search / Foundry IQ. This lets developers and architects use authoritative SQL tables as a source for Copilot, RAG, and agentic experiences.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure SQL updates for early-June
item.description:
Azure SQL now supports using AES 256 symmetric keys to configure transparent data encryption (TDE) with customer-managed keys in Azure SQL Database. This update is in public preview and applies to early June 2026.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure SQL Database provisioning in the MSSQL extension
item.description:
The MSSQL extension for Visual Studio Code now supports Azure SQL Database provisioning in public preview. It starts with the free tier and lets you create and connect to a managed cloud database directly from the editor.

  • Source: Azure Updates
